## Inclusion Criteria Checklist

- [ ] Resource is relevant to Claude Code security or secure AI coding agent operations
- [ ] Source is credible (official, respected firm, recognized researcher)
- [ ] Resource is practically useful
- [ ] High signal content, not marketing fluff
- [ ] Current (updated within 18 months or foundationally relevant)
- [ ] Not a duplicate of existing entries
- [ ] Description is 15-30 words
- [ ] Format matches existing entries (hyphen marker, proper link format)
